# GKRTreeSplitStrategy.halve

**Case**

An option to split groups of elements in half based on the order they were added to the tree in.

## Declaration

```swift
case halve
```

## Constants

- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.linear**: An option to split groups of elements by finding a line that divides space so that half of the elements are on either side.
- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.quadratic**: An option to split groups of elements by finding the subgroups that occupy the least area.
- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.reduceOverlap**: An option to split groups of elements by finding the subgroups whose areas overlap the least.
